steps.name: Cardiologist Consultation
steps.description: Initial cardiac assessment, symptom history, risk factor evaluation.

steps.name: ECG (Electrocardiogram)
steps.description: Detects abnormal heart rhythms and ischemic changes.

steps.name: 2D Echocardiogram
steps.description: Assesses heart wall motion and ejection fraction.

steps.name: Stress Test (TMT)
steps.description: Exercise stress test to detect ischemia under load.

steps.name: Coronary Angiography
steps.description: Gold standard — visualises coronary artery blockages.

steps.name: Angioplasty + Stent (PCI)
steps.description: Balloon angioplasty with stent placement to open blocked artery.

steps.name: Medical Management
steps.description: Beta-blockers, statins, nitrates, aspirin. Lifestyle modification.

steps.name: Lifestyle Modification
steps.description: Diet, exercise, smoking cessation, weight management.

steps.name: Gastroenterologist Consultation
steps.description: Symptom history, dietary assessment, medication review.

steps.name: Upper GI Endoscopy
steps.description: Direct visualization of esophagus, stomach, duodenum.

steps.name: H. pylori Test
steps.description: Biopsy or breath test to detect H. pylori infection.

steps.name: Surveillance Endoscopy + Surgery Consult
steps.description: 3-monthly surveillance. Nissen fundoplication if refractory.

steps.name: PPI Therapy (8 weeks) + Follow-up Endoscopy
steps.description: Omeprazole/Pantoprazole + follow-up in 8 weeks.

steps.name: PPI Therapy + Lifestyle Changes
steps.description: Antacids, head elevation, dietary modification, weight loss.

steps.name: Orthopedic Consultation
steps.description: Severity grading, functional assessment, BMI evaluation.

steps.name: X-Ray Knee (Weight-bearing)
steps.description: Assesses joint space narrowing and alignment.

steps.name: MRI Knee
steps.description: Evaluates cartilage, ligaments, meniscus damage.

steps.name: Pre-operative Fitness Evaluation
steps.description: Blood tests, ECG, anaesthesia assessment.

steps.name: Pre-op Physiotherapy
steps.description: Strengthens quadriceps to improve post-op outcomes.

steps.name: Total Knee Replacement Surgery
steps.description: Resurfacing of femur, tibia, patella with metal/plastic implants. 3–5 day hospital stay.

steps.name: Post-op Physiotherapy (6 weeks)
steps.description: Mandatory rehabilitation for range of motion and strength.

steps.name: Intra-articular Injection + Physiotherapy
steps.description: Hyaluronic acid or steroid injection + physiotherapy program.

steps.name: Conservative: Weight Loss + Physiotherapy + NSAIDs
steps.description: Pain management and muscle strengthening.

steps.name: Interventional Cardiologist Consultation
steps.description: Assessment of symptoms, risk factors, prior cardiac history.

steps.name: ECG + Cardiac Enzymes
steps.description: Troponin, CK-MB to detect myocardial damage.

steps.name: 2D Echocardiogram
steps.description: Wall motion abnormality, EF assessment.

steps.name: Coronary Angiography (Diagnostic)
steps.description: Catheter-based imaging of coronary arteries.

steps.name: PCI + Drug-Eluting Stent
steps.description: Balloon angioplasty with DES implant. Same sitting as angiography.

steps.name: Dual Antiplatelet Therapy (12 months)
steps.description: Aspirin + Clopidogrel/Ticagrelor to prevent stent thrombosis.

steps.name: CABG (Bypass Surgery) Referral
steps.description: Referred to cardiac surgery for bypass grafting.

steps.name: Optimal Medical Therapy
steps.description: Statins, beta-blockers, aspirin + risk factor modification.

steps.name: Emergency Room Assessment
steps.description: Clinical examination, Alvarado score, pain assessment.

steps.name: Blood Tests (WBC, CRP)
steps.description: Elevated WBC and CRP indicate infection/inflammation.

steps.name: Ultrasound Abdomen
steps.description: First-line imaging to visualise appendix.

steps.name: CT Abdomen (if unclear)
steps.description: Higher sensitivity/specificity when ultrasound is inconclusive.

steps.name: Emergency Open Appendectomy + IV Antibiotics
steps.description: Open surgery for complex appendicitis. ICU possible. 5–7 day stay.

steps.name: Laparoscopic Appendectomy
steps.description: Keyhole surgery. 2–3 day hospital stay. Fast recovery.

steps.name: IV Antibiotics Trial (Non-operative)
steps.description: Antibiotic-first approach. Surgery if no improvement in 48 hrs.

steps.name: Surgeon / Gastroenterologist Consultation
steps.description: Symptom history, dietary habits, risk factors (4 F's).

steps.name: Ultrasound Abdomen
steps.description: Gold standard for detecting gallstones.

steps.name: Liver Function Tests
steps.description: Detects biliary obstruction (elevated bilirubin, ALP).

steps.name: MRCP (if CBD stone suspected)
steps.description: Non-invasive imaging of bile ducts.

branch_point.label: Based on stone location and symptoms:

steps.name: ERCP + Stone Extraction
steps.description: Endoscopic removal of common bile duct stones.

steps.name: Laparoscopic Cholecystectomy (after ERCP)
steps.description: Gallbladder removal after bile duct clearance.

steps.name: Laparoscopic Cholecystectomy
steps.description: Keyhole gallbladder removal. 1–2 day hospital stay.

steps.name: Conservative Monitoring + Diet Modification
steps.description: Low-fat diet. Surgery only if symptoms develop.

steps.name: Endocrinologist / Physician Consultation
steps.description: Symptom history, family history, lifestyle assessment.

steps.name: HbA1c + Fasting Blood Glucose
steps.description: HbA1c >6.5% confirms diabetes. Baseline glycaemic control.

steps.name: Renal / Liver / Lipid Panel
steps.description: Kidney function, liver enzymes, lipid profile for complication screening.

steps.name: Retinal Examination
steps.description: Annual dilated fundus exam to screen for diabetic retinopathy.

steps.name: Foot Examination + Neuropathy Screen
steps.description: Monofilament test, pulses, ankle reflexes.

steps.name: Insulin Therapy + Specialist Management
steps.description: Basal-bolus insulin regimen + specialist referrals for complications.

steps.name: Oral Hypoglycaemics (Metformin + 2nd agent)
steps.description: Metformin + SGLT2 inhibitor or DPP-4 inhibitor. 3-monthly HbA1c.

steps.name: Lifestyle Intervention + Metformin
steps.description: Diet control, weight loss, exercise. Metformin if lifestyle insufficient.

steps.name: Physician Consultation
steps.description: Multiple BP readings, secondary cause assessment, risk stratification.

steps.name: BP Monitoring (3 readings on 2 occasions)
steps.description: Confirms sustained hypertension vs white-coat hypertension.

steps.name: ECG + Kidney Function + Urine Albumin
steps.description: Target organ damage screening.

steps.name: Echocardiogram (if LVH suspected)
steps.description: Assesses left ventricular hypertrophy.

branch_point.label: Based on BP level and risk:

steps.name: Hospitalisation + IV Antihypertensives
steps.description: Emergency BP control. IV labetalol or nitroprusside.

steps.name: Combination Antihypertensives (2 drugs)
steps.description: ACE inhibitor + CCB or ARB + thiazide. Monthly follow-up.

steps.name: Lifestyle + Single Antihypertensive
steps.description: DASH diet, exercise, low salt + single drug if persistent.

pathway_lower_back.condition: Lower Back Pain / Lumbar Disc Disease

steps.name: Orthopedic / Neurosurgeon Consultation
steps.description: Neurological exam, red flag screening, pain duration assessment.

steps.name: X-Ray Lumbar Spine
steps.description: Rules out fracture, spondylolisthesis, degeneration.

steps.name: MRI Lumbar Spine
steps.description: Required if neurological deficits, radiculopathy, or failed conservative care.

steps.name: Physiotherapy Trial (4–6 weeks)
steps.description: Core strengthening, McKenzie exercises, hot/cold therapy.

branch_point.label: Based on response and neurological findings:

branches.label: Cauda Equina / Foot Drop / Failed Conservative

steps.name: Microdiscectomy / Laminectomy
steps.description: Surgical decompression of nerve root. 2–3 day hospital stay.

steps.name: Epidural Steroid Injection
steps.description: Fluoroscopy-guided injection for nerve root inflammation.

steps.name: Continued Physiotherapy + NSAIDs + Posture Correction
steps.description: Extended physiotherapy, ergonomic advice, weight management.

steps.name: Ophthalmologist Consultation
steps.description: Visual acuity, functional impact assessment, patient suitability.

steps.name: Slit Lamp Examination
steps.description: Grades cataract density (nuclear, cortical, posterior subcapsular).

steps.name: A-Scan Biometry (IOL Power Calculation)
steps.description: Calculates intraocular lens power before surgery.

steps.name: Pre-operative Blood Tests + ECG
steps.description: Fitness for local/general anaesthesia.

steps.name: Phacoemulsification + IOL Implant
steps.description: Ultrasound lens removal + IOL insertion. Day-care procedure. 30 min.

steps.name: ECCE (Manual Large-Incision) + Monofocal IOL
steps.description: Manual extraction for very dense cataracts. Longer recovery.

steps.name: Phaco + Monofocal IOL + Post-op Eye Drops (4 weeks)
steps.description: Standard of care. Antibiotic + steroid drops for 4 weeks.

steps.name: Phaco + Premium Multifocal / Toric IOL
steps.description: Advanced IOL for spectacle independence. Higher cost.
